scripts.reset-db: knex migrate:rollback --all --env development && knex migrate:latest --env development && knex seed:run --env development
scripts.test:prepare-db: node scripts/setupTestDb.js && cross-env NODE_ENV=test knex migrate:latest --env test && cross-env NODE_ENV=test knex seed:run --env test
scripts.test: npm run test:prepare-db && npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration && npm run test:e2e:api
scripts.test:integration:mocked: cross-env NODE_ENV=test vitest run --config vitest.integration.config.js --maxWorkers=1 Mocked
scripts.test:integration:realdb: cross-env NODE_ENV=test vitest run --config vitest.integration.config.js --maxWorkers=1 RealDB
